name: mise
description: Installs mise (modern dev tool manager, replaces asdf) and configures shell integration for managing language runtimes and dev tools

version.description: mise version to install (e.g. 2025.6.0 or latest)

shells.description: Comma-separated list of shells to configure (bash, zsh, fish)

autoActivate.description: Automatically activate mise when shell starts by adding to shell rc files

trustWorkspaceConfig.description: Automatically trust mise configuration in workspace (run mise trust after install)
